meta.title: Ghost Studio | Production & Creation
meta.description: Production and creation studio. We transform ideas into experiences.

brazilShowcase.description: World-class locations, legendary talent, and stories only Brazil can tell. From the streets of Rio to the Amazon rainforest — we bring your vision to life.

whyWorkWithUs.title: WE DON'T JUST PRODUCE — WE CREATE EXPERIENCES THAT CONNECT BRANDS TO PEOPLE.
whyWorkWithUs.chat1: Can you turn our ideas into a memorable experience?

items.title: PRODUCTION
items.description: Complete production of events, audiovisual content, and immersive experiences.

items.title: CREATION
items.description: Development of creative concepts and striking visual identities.

items.title: DIRECTION
items.description: Artistic and photographic direction for campaigns and special projects.

items.title: POST-PRODUCTION
items.description: Editing, color grading, and visual effects to elevate your project.

items.quote: Excellent partnership. Results beyond expectations. I recommend it for any brand that wants to stand out.
items.name: Ana Silva

items.quote: Creativity and professionalism in every detail. They turned our vision into reality.
items.name: Carlos Santos

items.quote: They exceeded all expectations. The result was incredible and the process was very professional.
items.name: Maria Costa

items.question: How long does a project take?
items.answer: It depends on scope and complexity, but we deliver most projects in 2 to 8 weeks.

items.question: Do you work with any budget?
items.answer: Projects starting at R$ 5,000. Each project is quoted according to your specific needs.

items.question: Do you work outside of São Paulo?
items.answer: Yes, we work across Brazil. We can send our team to any city.

items.question: How does the process work?
items.answer: Briefing → Concept → Production → Delivery. We keep you involved at every stage.
